title: Clean Economy Investment Tax Credits (ITCs) - Canada.ca
content:
## Clean Economy Investment Tax Credits (ITCs)
As a business, you may be eligible for tax credits for investments in Canada that support the transition to net zero emissions.

## Carbon Capture, Utilization, and Storage
Investments in technologies that capture CO 2 emissions to either store or use in industry
Investments of capital in the adoption and operations of new clean technology property in Canada
Investments of capital in the production of clean hydrogen and clean ammonia in Canada

## Clean Technology Manufacturing
Investments of capital in new clean technology manufacturing and processing, and critical mineral extraction and processing in Canada
Investments of capital in the deployment of clean electricity property in Canada

### For incentive claimants: Avoiding the reduced tax credit rate
Elect to meet the labour requirements to avoid claiming the reduced tax credit rate

### For workers: What you need to know
As a worker, understand your rights if your employer elects to meet the labour requirements
Learn more about Clean Economy tax incentives by browsing our multimedia products

### Clean Economy ITC webinars
Learn about eligibility guidelines, labour requirements and how to claim the ITCs by joining a webinar
Stay up to date with the latest news and information related to the Clean Economy ITCs

## Education and outreach
Discover how our tailored outreach activites can support you
Annual statistics on the Clean Economy Investment Tax Credits

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
